title: dipladenia gentianoides var. pohliana
intro: Dipladenia gentianoides var. pohliana, also known as the Pohliana dipladenia, is a flowering plant species within the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help in soothing wounds, reducing pain, and fighting off infections. The health benefits associated with the Pohliana dipladenia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even serve as an anthelmintic to expel intestinal parasites. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
